articles.title: Araghchi: Israel using US taxpayer money to silence critics
articles.summary: Araghchi: Israel using US taxpayer money to silence critics Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi stated in an X post that "Israel is using U.S. taxpayer dollars to silence any U.S. critics." In the post, Araghchi included a screenshot of a recent Time magazine article on Brad Parscale, former campaign manager for US President Donald Trump, entitled "Trump's ex-campaign manager is running an Israeli influence operation targeting the MAGA base." The post comes as the US continues its sixth day of strikes on Iran following the breakdown of the ceasefire agreement.

articles.title: Israeli forces continue drone strikes in southern Lebanon
articles.summary: Israeli forces continue drone strikes in southern Lebanon Israeli forces struck the Al-Mansouri area in Tyre district, southern Lebanon earlier on Friday morning, according to Lebanese National News Agency (NNA). The Israeli military also conducted an overnight operation that trapped residents of Haris, southern Lebanon, NNA reported. As of yesterday, the Lebanese Ministry of Public Health reported that 4,324 people have been killed by Israeli strikes in Lebanon since 2 March.

According to UKMTO, the crew were safe and no environmental impact was reported.

articles.title: US attack killed at least 38 since late June, Iran's health ministry says
articles.summary: US attack killed at least 38 since late June, Iran's health ministry says Iran's health ministry said that at least 38 people were killed and more than 400 wounded in the country since the US resumed attacks on 22 June. The ministry's spokesman, Hossein Kermanpourm, indicated that among those killed is one child and three women. Meanwhile, 22 women and nine children were wounded.

articles.title: US coalition shoots down drones over Iraq's Erbil: Kurdish counterterrorism forces
articles.summary: US coalition shoots down drones over Iraq's Erbil: Kurdish counterterrorism forces The US-led coalition shot down several drones on Friday over Erbil, in Iraq's northern Kurdistan region, Kurdish counterterrorism forces said. "Coalition forces downed eight explosive-laden drones over Erbil between 04:19 and 05:25 am (0119 and 0225 GMT)", the forces indicated, adding that there was no damage or casualties reported.

articles.title: Child wounded during 'interception operations': Qatar’s Ministry of Interior
articles.summary: Child wounded during 'interception operations': Qatar’s Ministry of Interior One child has been injured as a result of falling shrapnel from "interception operations", according to Qatar’s Ministry of Interior. The ministry indicated that the child is "currently receiving the necessary medical care". The statement comes after the country's defence ministry said that it was intercepting a number of aerial attacks, after several reports of blasts heard in the capital of Doha.

articles.title: China and Pakistan urge resumption of US-Iran peace talks
articles.summary: China and Pakistan urge resumption of US-Iran peace talks China's Foreign Minister Wang Yi and his Pakistani counterpart Ishaq Dar urged that a ceasefire be reached between the US and Iran.  The two countries called for a resumption of dialogue between Washington and Tehran and that all parties fulfil their commitments and abide by the Memorandum of Understanding.
